ItemFilter.name: Warpath Void Knight
ItemFilter.description: BinaQc's Regular - Recommended filter-strictness for leveling season-starters. Progressively hides the worst items & highlights potential upgrades.

Condition.RuneFilterFlags: RuneOfAscendance RuneOfCreation RuneOfWeaving RuneOfHavoc RuneOfRedemption RuneOfEvolution RuneOfCorruption

Rule.nameOverride: CoF Rune of Ascendance (Select Item Type)
Tier 6 Wanted Affixes (Can Edit Affixes & Item Type)
Exalted Bases for Alt Leveling Setup (T7)
Wanted Tier 7 (Can Edit Affixes & Item Type)
Rare Monolith Timeline Boss Drops - 1 LP+
Very Rare Uniques With 1 LP (80% Reroll Chance)
Very Rare Uniques With 1 LP(85% Reroll Chance)
Very Rare Uniques With 1 LP (90% Reroll Chance)
Any Class Alt Leveling Uniques - Campaign
Any Class Alt Leveling Uniques - Reflect lvl 35
Legendary Uniques From Planner (Fail Safe Rule)
Uniques & Sets From Planner (Optional: Add More)
Corrupted Uniques & Sets From Planner (Optional: Add More)
Uniques From Planner 1 LP - Turtle Rule (Optional: Add More)
Uniques From Planner 2 LP (Optional: Add More)
Uniques From Planner 3 LP (Optional: Add More)
